positive: A minimalist and vibrant jungle fauna illustration centered composition, featuring a majestic Bengal tiger in profile resting near a stylized tropical lily pad, surrounded by interlocking monstera leaves, heliconia blossoms, and delicate vine tendrils. The style should be highly detailed graphic art, inspired by modern tattoo flash and vintage botanical etchings, using a limited but rich color palette of deep emerald green, sapphire blue, burnt orange, and creamy white. Strong contrast is key; the silhouette of the tiger and leaves should pop against a neutral background. Clean vector lines, symmetrical balance, highly scalable, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, grain, dirty, messy, photographic, photorealistic, cartoon, messy background
